PulseCart
Anchor then target fixture
237 layered offers

One unique badge anchors the search. The actual target preview is still ambiguous on its own.

Staged matching

Find the right tile by a unique anchor first, then recover the ambiguous preview.

This page deliberately places two nearly identical dryers inside a crowded marketplace. The unique anchor badge narrows the region so the second image match becomes safe.

Pick a tile

The target opens only after the staged anchor-then-target match resolves the near-duplicate preview pair.

Why this fixture is harder

  • The preview crop is not unique globally.
  • The anchor badge is unique but not the final click target.
  • The second step depends on the region recovered from the first.
  • Mixed categories and repeated card layout stay noisy around the pair.
